title: JO/FOIN E1L5 River Avon SSSI overhead line, S37 Consent, Electricity Act 1989
body: "Secretary of State’s screening decisions in accordance with the Electricity Works (Environmental Impact Assessment) (England and Wales) Regulations 2017.  Date of decision  9 May 2025  Location   River Avon system SSSI   Type of project / consent requested  Section 37 consent to install or keep installed an electric line.  "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
